heading: Availability of transcripts
label: 1010 Availability of transcripts

children.heading: .—Definition of Agency Proceeding
children.label: a .—Definition of Agency Proceeding
children.text: In this section, the term “agency proceeding” has the meaning given the term in .section 551 of this title

children.heading: .—Availability
children.label: b .—Availability
children.text: Agencies and advisory committees shall make available to any person, at actual cost of duplication, copies of transcripts of any agency proceeding or advisory committee meeting.
